---
title: "Human-CAIR — Human-Centered AI Research Lab"
subtitle: "Director: Ozlem Ozmen Garibay · University of Central Florida"
description: "Human-CAIR develops fair, explainable, responsible AI systems aligned with human needs, spanning fairness, human-machine teams, social cybersecurity, and trustworthy BioAI."
---

## About Human-CAIR

The **Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence Research Lab**, directed by Dr. Ozlem Ozmen Garibay, develops AI systems that are **fair, explainable, responsible, and aligned with human needs**. The lab's research spans algorithmic fairness, explainable machine learning, human-machine teams, social cybersecurity, artificial social intelligence, network science, and complex systems.

## Director

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
![Headshot of Ozlem Ozmen Garibay](../assets/people/ozlem-garibay.jpeg)
:::
### Ozlem Ozmen Garibay
[Assistant Professor, IEMS · UCF]{.bm-person-role}
[Director, Human-CAIR · MoML]{.bm-person-affil}

Research in human-centered AI, responsible AI, explainable AI, fairness, molecular machine learning, BioAI, and human-AI systems.

::: {.bm-person-links}
[Profile](../people/faculty.qmd#ozlem-ozmen-garibay)
[Email](mailto:ozlem@ucf.edu)
[UCF profile](https://www.cecs.ucf.edu/faculty/ozlem-ozmen-garibay/)
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0RKzNtIAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::
:::

## Connection to BioMIND

Within BioMIND, Human-CAIR contributes the **human-centered and trustworthy AI foundation** for biological discovery, molecular intelligence, and responsible AI4Science. The lab's work helps ensure that BioAI systems are not only powerful, but also interpretable, fair, and useful to scientists and society.

## Research themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Human-centered AI
AI systems designed around human needs, abilities, and values.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Responsible AI
Ethics, governance, and societal-impact analysis of AI systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Explainable AI
Faithful, useful explanations for modern neural and foundation models.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Fairness in AI
Algorithmic fairness, bias mitigation, and audit methodologies.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Human-machine teams
Mixed-initiative interfaces and shared authority in expert workflows.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Social cybersecurity
Coupled dynamics of AI, networks, and adversarial information environments.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Trustworthy BioAI
Interpretable, calibrated, and human-aligned AI for biology and biomedicine.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Interpretable machine learning
Probing, attribution, and concept-based explanation methods.
:::

:::

## Related student research

Related student work includes **trustworthy AI**, **uncertainty quantification**, **reliable AI under distribution shift**, **explainable healthcare AI**, and **human-centered AI applications in scientific and clinical settings**.

Students with research aligned to Human-CAIR themes include [Elias Hossain](../people/students.qmd) and [Mehrdad Shoeibi](../people/students.qmd).

## People

Human-CAIR members are listed centrally on the BioMIND [People](../people/index.qmd) page.

## Publications and news

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) and [News](../news/index.qmd) pages for Human-CAIR contributions to the BioMIND record.
